actionCalls.description: Notify a contact when the status of a Case changes to Closed
actionCalls.name: Notify_Case_Contact_of_Closed_Case
actionCalls.label: Notify Case Contact of Closed Case

value.stringValue: Notificaciones por correo electrónico de cierre de caso

actionCalls.description: When a new Case is created send a notification to the Contact
actionCalls.name: Notify_Case_Contact_of_New_Case
actionCalls.label: Notify Case Contact of New Case

value.stringValue: Notificación por correo electrónico de creación de casos

decisions.description: Notifications require that the contact has an email address
decisions.name: Contact_has_email_address
decisions.label: Contact has email address

decisions.description: Set Defaults for a new Case submitted by a Dealer
decisions.name: Dealer_New_Case_Check
decisions.label: Dealer New Case Check

decisions.description: Automation does not apply to Queue owned Cases
decisions.name: Queue_Owner
decisions.label: Queue Owner

formulas.name: frmCaseReason
formulas.expression: CASE( {!$Record.CTM_Case_Reason__c}, "Account Management Issues", "Problemas de manejo de cuenta", "Alarm", "Alarma", "Annual Returns", "Devoluciones Anuales", "Application Issue", "Problema de la aplicación", "Availability", "Disponibilidad", "Back Order", "Back Order", "Cancellations", "Cancelaciones", "Claim Rejection or Appeals", "Rechazo de reclamos o apelaciones", "Claim Update", "Actualización de reclamo", "Commissioning Issues", "Problemas durante puesta en marcha", "Complaint", "Queja general", "Concealed Damage", "Daño oculto", "Concession Request", "Requisición de concesión", "Contract Issues", "Problemas de contrato", "Core Return", "Retorno de Carcaza", "Coverage Information", "Información de cobertura", "Credit Memos", "Nota de Crédito", "Credits", "Crédito", "Customer Ordered in Error", "Error de ingreso de la OC", "Damages", "Daños", "Defective Shelf", "Empaque defectuoso", "Direct Ship Overage", "Exceso en Envío Directo", "Direct Ship Shortage", "Escasez en Envío Directo", "Electrical Standby", "Standby eléctrico", "Engine Authorization Request", "Requerida aprobacion de cambio Motor", "Expedite - unit down/emergency orders", "Expedite - unidad dañada/órdenes de emergencia", "Freight Charge/Surcharge", "Cargo por flete/recargo", "Freight Company Complaints", "Quejas de la empresa de transportista", "Freight Company Damage", "Daños por empresa transportista", "Freight Company O&S", "Empresa de transporte O&S", "Hardware Issues", "Problemas de hardware", "Incorrect Manual", "Manual incorrecto", "Incorrect Part Received", "Parte recibida incorrecta", "Installation Issues", "Problema de instalación", "Instructions not clear", "Instrucciones no claras", "Invoice issue", "Problema de facturación", "Issues", "Cuestiones", "Mandatory Part Return (MPR)", "Devolución obligatoria de piezas reemplazadas", "Misc. General Questions", "Varios Preguntas generales", "Misc. Technical Issues", "Problemas técnicos Misc.", "Missing Parts", "Faltantes", "New Part Set-up", "Configuración de precio de parte nueva", "New problem", "Nuevo problema", "NSU/Pricing", "Precio para refaccción NSU", "Order Entry Error", "Error en ingreso de orden", "Order Management", "Gestión de Ordenes", "Order Status/Tracking", "Estado/seguimiento de la orden", "Ordered in Error", "Orden en Error", "Other", "Otro", "Overage", "Exceso", "Package Label Error", "Paquete error etiqueta", "Package Labeled Wrong", "Paquete mal etiquetado", "Part Incomplete/Missing Components", "Parte incompleta/Componente faltante", "Part Issue", "Problemas de partes", "Problem Resolution", "Resolución problema", "Product Documentation", "Documentación del producto", "Program Information", "Información del programa", "Quote Issue", "Problemas de cotización", "Return Request", "Requesición de devolución", "Scheduled Maintenance", "Mantenimiento Programado", "Short Shipment", "Envío incompleto", "Shortage", "Escasez", "Special Product Purchase", "Compra de productos especiales", "Special Quote Request", "Requerimiento de cotización especial", "Specification", "Especificación", "Standard Repair Time (SRT)", "Tiempo de reparación estándar", "Surplus", "Excedente", "Technical Doubt", "Duda técnica", "Technical Question", "Pregunta técnica", "Temperature Control", "Control de temperatura", "Terms & Conditions", "Términos y Condiciones", "Troubleshooting", "Solución de problemas", "Unit Behavior", "Comportamiento de la unidad", "Warranty Claim Issue", "Problema de reclamo de Garantía", "Warranty Coverage", "Cobertura de garantía", "Warranty Registration Issue", "Problema con el Registro de Garantia", "Website Issues", "Problemas con el sitio web", "Wrong Document Attached to Email", "Documento incorrecto adjunto al correo electrónico", "Wrong Part Received", "Parte recibida errónea", "")

formulas.name: frmCaseType
formulas.expression: CASE({!$Record.Type}, "BluEdge", "BluEdge", "Complaint", "Requerimiento", "Concession Request", "Requisición de concesión", "Core Return", "Devolución principal", "Documentation", "Documentación", "Engine Authorization Request", "Solicitud de Autorización de Motor", "Information", "Información", "Issues", "Cuestiones", "New Part Set-Up/Pricing", "Configuración/Precio de Parte Nueva", "Order Management", "Manejo de Orden", "Overage/Shortage Discrepancy", "Discrepancia por Exceso/Escasez", "Product", "Producto", "Product Information", "Información del Producto", "Product Quality", "Calidad del Producto", "Question", "Pregunta", "Returns", "Devoluciones", "Sales Order Inquiry", "Consulta de Orden de Venta", "Service", "Servicio", "Service/Technical Issue", "Servicio/Problema técnico", "Shipment", "Envío", "Shipment Issues", "Problemas de envío", "Technical Issue", "Problema Técnico", "Technical Support", "Soporte Técnico", "Unit Download Review", "Revisión de descarga de unidad", "Unit Order Maintenance", "Mantenimiento de órdenes de unidades", "Unit Order Management", "Gestión de Ordenes de Unidades", "Warranty", "Garantías", "")

formulas.name: frmCloseReason
formulas.expression: CASE({!$Record.NATT_Close_Reason__c}, "Addressed Billing Discrepancy", "Discrepancia de facturación abordada", "Administrative Information Provided", "Información Administrativa Provista", "Administrative Support Provided", "Apoyo administrativo proporcionado", "Canceled", "Cancelado", "Claim Updated", "Reclamación actualizada", "Credit Issued", "Crédito otorgado", "Dealer/Customer Resolved Issue", "Problema resuelto por el distribuidor/cliente", "Denied", "Denegado", "Duplicate Issue", "Problema duplicado", "Information Provided", "Información proporcionada", "Order/Part Shipped", "Pedido/Parte enviada", "Other", "Otro", "Part Priced", "Precio parcial", "Part Set Up", "Configuración de piezas", "Resolved by Orbcomm", "Resuelto por Orbcomm", "Return Authorization Issued", "Autorización de devolución emitida", "Returning Part", "Parte que regresa", "Shipped Parts", "Piezas enviadas", "Technical Information Provided", "Información técnica proporcionada", "Technical Support Provided", "Soporte técnico proporcionado", "Website Support Provided", "Soporte de sitio web proporcionado", "")

formulas.name: frmRecordTypeName
formulas.expression: CASE({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName}, "CTM_Unit_Sales", "CTM Venta de Unidades", "CTM_eSolutions", "CTM eSoluciones", "CTM_Finance", "CTM Finanzas", "CTM_Performance_Parts", "CTM Refacciones", "CTM_Warranty", "CTM Garantía", "CTM_Customer_Service", "CTM Servicio al Cliente", "CTM_Service_Engineering_Field_Service", "CTM Servicio de ingeniería Servicio de campo", "" )

formulas.description: Set the default value of the Subject for Performance Parts cases
formulas.name: PerformancePartsSubjectDefaultValue
formulas.expression: "Performance Parts Case with Type: " & Text({!$Record.Type}) & " and Case Reason: " & Text({!$Record.CTM_Case_Reason__c})

formulas.description: Set the default value of the Subject for Core Returns cases
formulas.name: SubjectDefaultValue
formulas.expression: CASE( {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName}, "CTM_Unit_Sales", "Venta de Unidades: " & {!frmCaseReason}, "CTM_Customer_Service", "Servicio al Cliente: " & {!frmCaseReason}, "CTM_Finance", "Finanzas: " & {!frmCaseReason}, "CTM_Warranty", "Garantía: " & {!frmCaseReason}, "CTM_eSolutions", "eSoluciones: " & {!frmCaseType} & " - " & {!frmCaseReason}, "CTM_Performance_Parts", "Estuche de Refacciones con tipo: " & {!frmCaseType} & " y Motivo del caso: " & {!frmCaseReason}, "CTM_Service_Engineering_Field_Service", "Ingeniería de Servicio y Servicio de Campo: " & {!frmCaseType}, "")

Flow.interviewLabel: CTM Case Setup and Case Team Updates {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: CTM Case Setup and Case Team Updates

recordCreates.description: Add the User as a Case Team Member
recordCreates.name: Create_Case_Team_Member
recordCreates.label: Create Case Team Member

recordLookups.name: Get_Case_Team_Member_Records_for_Case_Owner
recordLookups.label: Get Case Team Member Records for Case Owner

recordLookups.description: Get the Default Queue from the Case
recordLookups.name: Get_Default_Queue
recordLookups.label: Get Default Queue

recordLookups.description: Some eSolutions Cases need to be automatically assigned to the Service Engineering and Field Service Queue
recordLookups.name: Get_SvcEng_FS_Queue
recordLookups.label: Get Service Engineering and Field Service Queue

recordUpdates.description: Default the Account Name to the User's Account
recordUpdates.name: Account_Name_Default
recordUpdates.label: Account Name Default

recordUpdates.description: For Core Returns the Subject field will be set to "Core Returns"
recordUpdates.name: AddSubject
recordUpdates.label: AddSubject

recordUpdates.description: Assign the case to the Queue for the Record Type
recordUpdates.name: Assign_Case_to_Queue
recordUpdates.label: Assign Case to Queue

recordUpdates.name: Assign_Case_to_SE_FS_Queue
recordUpdates.label: Assign Case to Service Engineering and Field Service Queue

recordUpdates.description: Assign the user's Contact record to the Contact Name
recordUpdates.name: Contact_Name_Default
recordUpdates.label: Contact Name Default

recordUpdates.description: A Type of Sales Order Inquiry and a Case Reason of Expedite - unit down/emergency orders should receive a Priority of Critical
recordUpdates.name: Unit_Down_Set_Priority
recordUpdates.label: Unit Down - Set Priority

textTemplates.description: Notify Case Contact about Closing a Case
textTemplates.name: CaseCloseTemplate

textTemplates.description: Send an alert about a new Case
textTemplates.name: NewCaseTemplate
